title: Compare numbers of objects 1
description: Practice counting which group has more objects.

assessment_items.question_content:
Sam fed ![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/9441ee45a0bd66962292e546a5ae2f3c.png)

Jo fed ![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/1ed0df7bd3d8dd7bc471bb337be0f38e.png)

**Who fed more sharks?**
[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
Sam fed $\red{10}$ sharks.  
Jo fed $\green{7}$ sharks.  

$\red{10}$ is more than $\green{7}$.
Sam fed more sharks.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Are there more chicks or turtles?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
There are $\purple{7}$ chicks.

There are $\pink{5}$ turtles.

$\purple{7}$ is more than $\pink{5}$.

There are $\purple{\text{more}}$ chicks.

![A row of 7 chicks.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/7cde6ba7f8251748d86f997ee7d596d1.png)

choices.content: There are the same number of each.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which cage has more mice?**

[[☃ radio 2]]
hints:
![A cage has 7 mice. The mice are numbered 1 through 7.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/f3eaf21d14f1baaf02310368ee625a79.png)


![A cage has 10 mice. The mice are numbered 1 through 10.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/8458e6dff2e2553a2fcdf91ecc7f85bd.png)
$\blue{10}$ is more than $\green{7}$.

This cage has more.  

![A cage has 10 mice.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/88527ccfcb30d0f813fbb2a1afda3bb2.png)

choices.content: There are the same number of mice in each cage.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which fish tank has fewer fish?**

[[☃ radio 2]]
hints:
$\redC{\huge{7 \text{ fish}}}$   
![A tank has 7 fish.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/058aee517de4483a1c8f480e9122d7c72e6ed150)

$\purpleC{\huge{10 \text{ fish}}}$   
![A tank has 10 fish.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/3004f8e44db2f23486894916dffcee5a38fd9ed1)
$\redC7$ is less than $\purpleC{10}$.

This fish tank has fewer fish.

![A tank has 7 fish.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/058aee517de4483a1c8f480e9122d7c72e6ed150)

choices.content: There are the same number of fish in each fish tank.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which field has more ponies?**

[[☃ radio 2]]
hints:
![A field has 8 ponies.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/4070a31ab849811b085cc6d72a7034adb63a11c5)


![A field has 8 ponies.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/21219c0fab23fd745586d2f55fc124a9c8f25b27)
$8$ is equal to $8$.
There are the same amount of ponies in each field.

choices.content: There are the same number of ponies in each field.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which tree has more apples?**

[[☃ radio 2]]
hints:
![A tree has 8 apples. The apples are numbered 1 through 8.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/508adee697f517108e1248da3410597ffa66fa3d)


![A tree has 6 apples. The apples are numbered 1 through 6.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/37018aacc6487dccc9c89688404a16e31ed3b974)
$8$ is more than $6$.

This tree has more apples.

![A tree has 8 apples.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/c76b4a344be15eee0811938c9fa7e442de609b4e)

choices.content: There are the same number of apples in each tree.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which cage tank has fewer bugs?**

[[☃ radio 2]]
hints:
$\greenD{\huge{9 \text{ bugs}}}$   
![A cage has 9 bugs.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/39894263eed5f691f035c576d1756ef913b88c02)

$\blueD{\huge{6 \text{ bugs}}}$   
![A cage has 6 bugs.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/2e4894a55f33f0649a151ad42a19a8244a872e37)
$\blueD6$ is less than $\greenD{9}$.

This cage has fewer bugs.

![A cage has 6 bugs.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/2e4894a55f33f0649a151ad42a19a8244a872e37)

choices.content: There are the same number of bugs in each cage.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which animal blew more bubbles?**

[[☃ radio 2]]
hints:
$\greenD{\huge{6\text{ bubbles}}}$   
![A chick with a row of 6 bubbles.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b771bfe0e8915279d68e39d8174228f68e80a5cc)

$\blueD{\huge{5 \text{ bubbles}}}$   
![A squirrel with a row of 5 bubbles.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/f3c03f967d47567c284b7f2a6e41911827ab74e7)
$\greenD6$ is more than $\blueD{5}$.

The chick blew more bubbles:

![A chick with a row of 6 bubbles.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b771bfe0e8915279d68e39d8174228f68e80a5cc)

choices.content: ![A chick with a row of 6 bubbles.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b771bfe0e8915279d68e39d8174228f68e80a5cc)
![A squirrel with a row of 5 bubbles.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/f3c03f967d47567c284b7f2a6e41911827ab74e7)
They blew the same amount of bubbles.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which basket has fewer eggs?**

[[☃ radio 2]]
hints:
$\purpleC{\huge{7 \text{ eggs}}}$   
![A purple basket has 7 eggs.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/f42cda07124fcde80ffcd297093cf207f4edafdd)

$\greenD{\huge{6 \text{ eggs}}}$   
![A green basket has 6 eggs.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/39067bffde014b2bf2a2a5b32ea244e3042b7463)
$\greenD6$ is less than $\purpleC{7}$.

This basket has fewer eggs.

![A green basket has 6 eggs.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/39067bffde014b2bf2a2a5b32ea244e3042b7463)

choices.content: There are the same number of eggs in each basket.
